content: I do believe that we are more and more quickly realizing the effects in our current paradigm and that more and more people are becoming involved in furthing the shift toward a saner, more compassionate reality. However painfully slow this transitional awareness has seemed to me, I can honestly say that I am greatly encouraged as time goes by and I see the numbers and feel the depth of people exploring these practicalities. I'm scared, on the other hand by the influence of the political, media, and institutional (corporate/capitalist) indoctrination and brainwashing powered that be who might seem to be in 'control'
